history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A screenshot shows a mobile game or content page overlaying a colorful anime-style background.

Main Subject:
The main visual focus is a large blue rectangular claim/premium banner with the text “1 Hari Premium,” a smaller line indicating remaining amount, and a white rounded button labeled “Klaim” on the right.

Setting:
The scene is an on-screen mobile interface with a dark, blue, anime-style background image featuring stylized character art, suggesting a gaming or media app view; the lighting is dominated by the bright blue overlay and white text.

Visual Details:
At the top, there is a user/avatar area on the left with a circular image and a check mark icon nearby, along with multiple lines of small UI text and a number. Near the top center, there is a thumbnail and the title text “KonoSuba” with “Episode 3” beneath it. Across the middle, there is white text reading “tinggalkan jejak” followed by a yellow smiling face. The central banner is bright blue with white text; it includes a small star/crown-like icon near the left of “1 Hari Premium” and the phrase “Tersisa 8 dari 10” in smaller white text below. On the right side of the banner is a white pill-shaped button with blue text “Klaim.” Along the bottom left, there is the text “5 Replies,” and near the bottom right there is an orange rounded label reading “Legendary.” The camera angle is not applicable since this is a screen capture; the composition is dominated by layered UI elements over the background illustration.

Visible Text:
Hael Raja Karbit K'A
40 menit lalu
KISU
LvL. 26.014
#8854303
KonoSuba
Episode 3
tinggalkan jejak
1 Hari Premium
Tersisa 8 dari 10
Klaim
5 Replies
Legendary

Practical Summary:
The image is a screenshot of an app screen showing a “1 Hari Premium” claim option with a “Klaim” button. It overlays the premium banner and related UI text on top of a dark blue anime-style background.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
